title: Add test coverage for social/writers.py draft orchestration
description: social/writers.py orchestrates the full Writer→Critic→Policy→Humanizer loop for Bluesky and LinkedIn with zero test coverage. write_drafts() dispatches agents in parallel and accumulates per-platform results — a regression here silently produces no drafts. The agent calls (run_agent_with_files, run_claude_prompt) can be mocked; the orchestration and error-handling logic is what needs testing.
requirements: tests/test_writers.py covers write_drafts() return shape and per-platform error isolation
run_agent_with_files and run_claude_prompt are mocked — no actual agent calls
Tests verify that a failure on one platform does not abort the other platform
context: write_drafts() uses ThreadPoolExecutor internally. Mock orchestrator.agents.run_agent_with_files and run_claude_prompt at the import path 'social.writers.run_agent_with_files'. _load_voice_guide caches to _VOICE_GUIDE global — reset between tests.
